sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
adj = seg['adjacency_list']

# Find blue and green nodes
blue_id = None
green_id = None
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        blue_id = n['id']
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        green_id = n['id']

print(f"Blue: {blue_id}, Green: {green_id}")

# Build adjacency map
adj_map = {}
for p in adj:
    adj_map.setdefault(p[0], []).append(p[1])
    adj_map.setdefault(p[1], []).append(p[0])

path_ids = set(n['id'] for n in nodes if n['color'] in ['W', 'g'])
path_ids.add(green_id)

from collections import deque
queue = deque()
queue.append((blue_id, []))
visited = {blue_id}
path = None

while queue:
    current, current_path = queue.popleft()
    for neighbor in adj_map.get(current, []):
        if neighbor == green_id:
            path = current_path + [current, green_id]
            break
        if neighbor in path_ids and neighbor not in visited:
            visited.add(neighbor)
            queue.append((neighbor, current_path + [current]))
    if path is not None:
        break

print("Path:", path)

def get_center(n):
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    return (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))

directions = []
for i in range(len(path)-1):
    fc = get_center(nodes[path[i]])
    tc = get_center(nodes[path[i+1]])
    dr = tc[0] - fc[0]
    dc = tc[1] - fc[1]
    if dr > 0: directions.append('DOWN')
    elif dr < 0: directions.append('UP')
    elif dc > 0: directions.append('RIGHT')
    elif dc < 0: directions.append('LEFT')

print("Directions:", directions)
print("Count:", len(directions)
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>

sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
adj = seg['adjacency_list']

blue_id = None
green_id = None
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        blue_id = n['id']
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        green_id = n['id']

adj_map = {}
for p in adj:
    adj_map.setdefault(p[0], []).append(p[1])
    adj_map.setdefault(p[1], []).append(p[0])

path_ids = set(n['id'] for n in nodes if n['color'] in ['W', 'g'])
path_ids.add(green_id)

from collections import deque
queue = deque()
queue.append((blue_id, []))
visited = {blue_id}
path = None

while queue:
    current, current_path = queue.popleft()
    for neighbor in adj_map.get(current, []):
        if neighbor == green_id:
            path = current_path + [current, green_id]
            break
        if neighbor in path_ids and neighbor not in visited:
            visited.add(neighbor)
            queue.append((neighbor, current_path + [current]))
    if path is not None:
        break

print("Path:", path)

def get_center(n):
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    return (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))

directions = []
for i in range(len(path)-1):
    fc = get_center(nodes[path[i]])
    tc = get_center(nodes[path[i+1]])
    dr = tc[0] - fc[0]
    dc = tc[1] - fc[1]
    if dr > 0: directions.append('DOWN')
    elif dr < 0: directions.append('UP')
    elif dc > 0: directions.append('RIGHT')
    elif dc < 0: directions.append('LEFT')

print("Directions:", directions)
print("Count:", len(directions))
</parameter>
